title: calamagrostis macrantha
intro: Calamagrostis macrantha, also known as Chinese feather reed grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis macrantha include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and stems are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
